Description: AI moves to the nearest cover when under fire.
AI squads call nearby allies for help.
Example: Another squad joins the fight after hearing gunfire.

Description: AI tries to move around instead of directly engaging.
Example: PMCs attack from the sides rather than charging.

Description: AI retreats to better positions when overwhelmed.
Cover System – AI moves to cover when under attack.
Example: PMCs reposition behind cover instead of standing in the open.

Description: Reinforcement Calls – Nearby squads join the fight when alerted.
Example: Additional squads arrive after gunfire is detected.

Description: Flanking AI – AI attacks from different angles instead of rushing.
Example: Enemies split to attack from multiple sides.

Description: More Dynamic Combat – AI makes smarter decisions based on the situation.
Example: AI adapts behavior depending on threat level.
